orchestrated_campaign.label: Orchestrated Campaign
orchestrated_campaign.description: Batch/multi-step campaign workflows scheduled to run on a population.
indicators: Has a scheduler or query activity (batch audience selection)
Has enrichment, deduplication, union, intersection, or exclusion activities
Has split or test activities for audience branching
Has updateData activity for record updates
Runs on a schedule, not triggered by a real-time event

journey.label: Journey
journey.description: Event-driven / 1:1 real-time workflows triggered by individual profile signals.
indicators: Triggered by a signal or external event (signal activity)
Very few activities — typically start → wait/action → end
No batch audience-building (no query, enrichment, deduplication)
Designed for individual profile triggers, not a batch population

unsupported.label: Unsupported
unsupported.description: Workflows that cannot be migrated to AJO due to unsupported activity types.
indicators: Contains file operations: fileImport, fileExport, writer, extract
